title: yayPi Seed
description: Defines seed data to insert into entity tables at startup or via 'yaypi seed'. Idempotent: rows are skipped if the key_field value already exists.

SeedDef.description: A set of rows to insert into a single entity's table.

entity.description: Entity name to seed rows into.

key_field.description: Field used to detect existing rows. If a row with this value exists, it is skipped (idempotent).

data.description: Rows to insert. Each item is a map of field name to value. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

items.description: A single row to insert. Keys are entity field names.
